---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it addresses.

**Example:**
> As an actuary, I want to be able to compare three assumption sets side-by-side so that I can better understand the differences between quarterly updates.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other products.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, business justification, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking current work)
- [ ] High (needed soon)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (someday/maybe)
